title: YTP: DaThings' Handy Guide for Upgrading Your Mom
description:
In this video, DaThings defeats Australia and wins the Olympic gold for breakdancing, reigniting the Americans' epic dance battle with Vietnam.

Farcette is a really great mod for Arzette: The Jewel of Faramore and you can download it here! https://elliespectacular.com/farcette 

It's like playing a @DaThings YTP and it's full of goofy hyuck hyucks!

If you loved this, subscribe for more and if you want to support me on Patreon, do so here:
https://www.patreon.com/Captpan6

And you can also follow me on my socials for all sorts of other cool stuff!
https://twitter.com/captpan6
https://www.tiktok.com/@captpan

#ytp
